title: subworkflow - expand alert fatigue and noise run post incident checks
description: Enterprise expansion subworkflow for fear theme `alert-fatigue-and-noise` and pattern `run-post-incident-checks`.\n\nDesigned to improve workflow adoption by automating reliability, security, and governance controls with explicit wait and verification.
guide:
## 🧩 Enterprise Expansion Subworkflow

### 🎯 Enterprise Concern
- **alert fatigue and noise**

### 🛠️ Pattern
- **run post incident checks**

### ⚙️ Primary Action
- **dynatrace.kubernetes.connector:kubernetes-batch-v1-create-namespaced-job**

### ▶️ Execution Behavior
- ▶️ Execute action
- ⏳ Wait for stabilization
- ✅ Check terminal status and fail on unsuccessful outcome

### 🧠 Why This Matters
- Helps enterprise teams automate high-friction operational controls and reduce outage risk.

wait-for-action.name: wait-for-action
wait-for-action.description: Wait for action to reach terminal state.

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Final status verification and fail-on-error gate.
